title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Supreme Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Supreme Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Supreme Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Bhubaneswar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Supreme Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Supreme Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Supreme Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd!
